creator: rjsattler@yahoo.com
text:
While trying to build the kde4-runtime package using "make install clean" I get the following error message:

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

I ran the [cmd]make[/cmd] again using the following command:

make clean
make MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=yes install clean

The process failed in the same location as shown above. Near the middle of this long block of text you will see that a number of files the process is looking for are not found. The process begins to fail at the section "Documentation Application VAD create".

I was able to run the make using an x11 desktop and was able to view the entire process. It appears there are several missing files required for this particular step.

Fix: 

n/a
How-To-Repeat: I ran the [cmd]make[/cmd] again using the following command:

make clean
make MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=yes install clean

- or - 

simply run "make", it fails every time.
